narrative.candidateAngle: Sales outreach representative with a background in customer-facing roles and experience in sales support.

targetStory.readerTakeaway: Candidate with proven sales support experience and skills, ready to contribute to outreach and pipeline development.

primaryStory: Proven sales support experience in high-pressure environments (e.g. Hawkers, Bar Louie)
skills demonstrated through customer interactions and team coordination
Experience in pipeline development and operational support through technical roles
narrative.summaryGoal: Highlight sales support experience and communication skills; connect to outreach and pipeline development without overstating technical roles.

summaryDecision.reason: Summary connects scattered proof but may not add significant value given the strong experience evidence.

skillsStrategy: Supporting: Team Coordination, Customer Support, Outreach
Trim last sparingly—only if clearly off-topic.

sectionStrategy.summary: Keep to connect proof; emphasize sales and communication skills
sectionStrategy.experience: Focus on sales support roles; lead with Hawkers
sectionStrategy.projects: No hero projects; supporting reference only if needed
sectionStrategy.education: Light—credentials frozen; trim highlights only if they sharpen scan.

rewriteGoals: Land hero experience: lead with the role’s primary signal (services/APIs/pipelines/data) on each line; leave an evidence-backed impression of scope—full bullet-block rewrites when facts allow.
Land hero projects: foreground systems, integrations, consumers; state the impression the row should leave for this job—full-row rewrites when detail supports it.
avoid: No unsupported claims regarding outreach, leads, or B2B sales experience.
narrative.alignmentGuidance: Direct fit: lead with the role title and strongest JD-overlap evidence, while preserving resume-native breadth.
